description_long: This is a robust hammer with a large, rectangular metallic head featuring clean, angular edges and a smooth, slightly matte finish. The head is predominantly silver-gray, with subtle panel lines and beveled corners, giving it a modern, industrial appearance. The handle is cylindrical, extending straight down from the center of the head, and is wrapped in a dark brown material with lighter bands, suggesting a textured grip for secure handling. The base of the handle is capped with a metallic ring, adding both durability and a visual accent. The hammer's proportions and design evoke a sense of strength and utility, suitable for heavy-duty tasks. There are no visible brand markings, wear, or additional attachments on the hammer.
description: A heavy-duty hammer with a large, silver-gray rectangular head and a straight, dark brown textured handle capped with metal. The design is modern, clean, and built for strength.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rectangular metallic head and the straight, dark brown handle extending downward.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the broad, flat striking face of the silver-gray head and the full length of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the rectangular head and handle alignment.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back face of the hammer head and the handle's metallic end cap.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle wrapped in dark brown leather with lighter grip bands and a metallic end cap.
attribute_head_type: Large rectangular sledge-type head with flat striking faces and beveled edges, made of metallic material.
